title: The first Slay the Spire 2 quest reveals the Ironclad's mighty bird companion
author: editor@pcgamesn.com
contents:
From Balatro and Zet Zillions to Cobalt Core and Wildfrost, we've seen a vast expansion of the best roguelike deckbuilders in recent years. But all eyes are on Slay the Spire 2. The pioneering genre champion remains a tough act to top even to this day, and its sequel promises to build on developer Mega Crit's creation with new classes, more cards, and a wealth of enemies to put your decks to the test. In a new blog, the studio reveals how it's splashing a tiny bit of RPG into StS 2 with the introduction of quest cards.

Read the rest of the story...
